description_long: This object is a compact quadcopter drone with a rectangular central body and four extended arms, each supporting a single rotor with two blades. The body is covered in a pastel-colored, grid-patterned texture, featuring hues of blue, green, and pink, with visible panel lines and small circular details suggesting access points or sensors. The arms are attached at the corners of the main body and appear reinforced, with the rotors positioned at the ends for stability. The landing gear consists of short, fixed legs beneath each arm, providing ground clearance for takeoff and landing. The front of the drone is marked by a slightly protruding section, possibly housing sensors or a camera, while the top surface is flat and segmented. The overall design is lightweight and functional, suitable for urban aerial navigation and observation.
description: A pastel-colored quadcopter drone with four rotors, a rectangular body, and fixed landing legs. The design features grid patterns, panel lines, and a compact, urban-ready form.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular body, four extended arms with rotors, and the slightly protruding front section.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat top, thin profile, and the arrangement of the rotors and landing legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical arm layout and the back panel details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the arm and rotor configuration and the grid-patterned surface.
